audience_policies.source_phrase: Type of pass: At the Bacon Free Library, this pass is a returnable pass. At the Morse Institute Library, this pass is an e-coupon. Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 3 people at 50% off per person. Additional instructions: -Present pass or e-coupon at Admissions to receive disc

coupon.source_phrase_block: Type of pass: At the Bacon Free Library, this pass is a returnable pass. At the Morse Institute Library, this pass is an e-coupon. Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 3 people at 50% off per person. Additional instructions: -Present pass or e-coupon at Admissions to receive discount.
